name: CYANOTECH CORP
summary: Cyanotech Corporation, founded in 1983 and operating through its subsidiary Nutrex Hawaii, is a global leader in microalgae cultivation at a 96-acre facility on the Kona Coast of Hawaii. The company produces two primary product lines: BioAstin Hawaiian Astaxanthin, a natural antioxidant dietary supplement, and Hawaiian Spirulina Pacifica, a nutrient-rich superfood. Products are sold as consumer supplements, bulk ingredients, and private label goods through distributors, retailers, and online channels worldwide.

products.name: BioAstin Hawaiian Astaxanthin
products.description: Natural antioxidant dietary supplement in gelcap, vegan gelcap, and gummy forms supporting skin, eye, joint, brain, and immune health.

products.name: Hawaiian Spirulina Pacifica
products.description: Nutrient-rich superfood dietary supplement available in powder, tablet, and gummy forms providing protein, carotenoids, and essential nutrients.

products.name: Contract Extraction and R&D Services
products.description: Contract extraction using supercritical CO2 technology and research and development services generating $849,000 in net sales in fiscal 2025.
